title: Bressanon 布列瑟农

lyrics.text: with the stars up in the sky

lyrics.translation: 想问繁星是否也照亮着

lyrics.text: You would be a sweet surrender
lyrics.translation: 心中甜蜜的痛 是你

lyrics.text: I must go the other way
lyrics.translation: 我却将在没有你的路上远去

lyrics.text: and my train will carry me onward
though my heart would surely stay
lyrics.translation: 而我的心留给你，它哪里也不去

lyrics.text: wo my heart would surely stay
lyrics.translation: 我的心留给你，它哪里也不去

lyrics.text: Now the clouds are flying by me
and the moon is on the rise
I have left stars behind me
they were disamonds in your skies
lyrics.translation: 闪烁如钻，装点你的夜空

lyrics.text: you would be a sweet surrender
lyrics.translation: 心中甜蜜的痛 是你

lyrics.text: I must go the other way
lyrics.translation: 我却将在没有你的路上远去

lyrics.text: and my train will carry me onward
though my heart would surely stay
lyrics.translation: 而我的心留给你，它哪里也不去

lyrics.text: wo my heart would surely stay
lyrics.translation: 我的心留给你，它哪里也不去
